title: State Assessment: English Learners/Emergent Bilingual Students
description: Students who are learning English or are identified as emergent bilingual may have specific rules about how they take state tests, including possible accommodations or exemptions based on their language background. The policy outlines how Conroe ISD determines which testing options apply to these students and ensures the district follows state guidelines designed to fairly assess what students know. Parents of emergent bilingual students can use this information to better understand their child's testing experience and rights during the state assessment process.
